task_completion.visual_evidence: An SEO auditing tool (like Screaming Frog SEO Spider) is open and shows https://crawler-test.com/ as the crawled URL.

task_completion.description: Identify links missing the rel='noopener' attribute
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SEO tool displays a 'Security' tab or a specific filter for 'Missing rel="noopener"' or 'Unsafe Cross-Origin Links', showing the vulnerable links.

task_completion.description: Export the identified links to the specified CSV path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, export dialog, or terminal shows the file 'unsafe_links.csv' saved in the '~/Documents/SEO/exports/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the CSV contains the required columns and links
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'unsafe_links.csv' are visible (e.g., in a spreadsheet viewer or text editor), showing 'Target' and 'Rel' columns, and listing the unsafe links (e.g., 'http://www.søkbar.no').

task_completion.description: Create the security summary text file in the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, text editor, or terminal shows the file 'security_summary.txt' located in the '~/Documents/SEO/reports/' directory.

task_completion.description: Record the total count of unsafe links in the summary file
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'security_summary.txt' file is open and displays the correct total count of unsafe links (which should be 2).

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI SEO tool to perform the audit
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a GUI application (like Screaming Frog) being used to crawl and filter the site, rather than a terminal script bypassing the tool.

integrity.description: The CSV file is a genuine export from the auditing tool
integrity.visual_evidence: The CSV file contains standard export formatting and headers from the SEO tool, rather than being manually typed out in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not hardcode the expected answers
integrity.visual_evidence: There is visual proof of the agent actually finding the 2 links in the auditing tool before creating the summary text file, rather than just creating the files immediately.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL: https://crawler-test.com/. Expected CSV path: /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/unsafe_links.csv. Expected report path: /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/security_summary.txt. The CSV must contain 'Target' and 'Rel' columns. There are exactly 2 unsafe links expected on the site: 'http://www.søkbar.no' and 'relativeurl:withcolon'. The summary text file should state a count of 2.
